---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg

about:
  template: broadside

---

I'm Tomonori Kawai, a data scientist working in ad division at Japan's largest free ad-supported streaming platform.

I lead the advertising data team. My work spans both sides: building production systems — ad delivery services in Go, data pipelines and monitoring in Python, cloud infrastructure with Terraform, warehouse modeling with dbt on BigQuery — and statistical modeling for ad measurement.

Before moving into data science, I spent several years in R&D across fragrance chemistry, healthcare, and insurance, after completing a master's in molecular biology at Kobe University. Earlier work is on GitHub.

This blog covers the statistical methods I use and study — causal inference for ad effectiveness, Bayesian modeling, and the mathematical foundations behind them. Most posts include R and Stan code.
